original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

relations.note: WCAG is the governing standard for the type/legibility rules.

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.intent: Ensure legible, accessible text sizing and spacing.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be at least 16px (size.text.min_body = 16px; bigger is better) with line height ≥150% (body.line_height = 150%), using more line height for light-on-dark text (line_height.light_on_dark = 160%). Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Guarantee perceivable content independent of color.
rules.rule_text: Test contrast (contrast.body = 4.5:1) and never rely on color alone to convey information; proof all text for legibility.

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.rule_text: Form labels must always be visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets must be ≥48px (size.touch_target.min = 48px).

quotes: no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback
Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Prevent motion that harms accessibility or fails in email clients.
rules.rule_text: Animations should use quick transitions that don't interrupt flow, avoid excessive motion, provide a way to pause effects, and be designed for phone, tablet, and desktop. For email, animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame), and no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s (motion.gif.max_duration = ~5s) without a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Provide text alternatives for non-text media per accessibility standards.
rules.rule_text: All images must carry descriptive alt text, and transcripts must be available for any video or audio.
The brand-mandated reference standard for accessibility is WCAG (wcag.com).
